blockingIssues.description: Session signing secret falls back to hardcoded "change-me" when SESSION_SECRET and JWT_SECRET are unset. Replace with fail-fast env validation to avoid predictable signing secret.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md auth transport/auth mechanism to reflect session cookies (withCredentials + express-session/connect-mongo) instead of JWT.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update auth bootstrap guidance to remove JWT token login wording and describe session-cookie bootstrap flow consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both session-auth reviews flagged AGENTS.md inconsistency: auth bootstrap still says login returns JWT while Session Cookie Auth Migration section documents cookie sessions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh implementation-worker skill guidance: remove outdated known-failing scheduledChanges test note and tighten procedure compliance expectations/reporting (agent-browser/TDD red phase).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: session-cookie-server review found stale known-failure guidance; session-cookie-client review found transcript lacking required procedure steps while handoff marked followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS auth bootstrap inconsistency (duplicated by both reviews).
Architecture doc stale JWT wording (duplicated by both reviews).
